focalfunc: func NewClient(vKey string, noStore bool, noDisplay bool) *Client
funcbody:
func NewClient(vKey string, noStore bool, noDisplay bool) *Client {
	return &Client{
		Cnf:		new(Config),
		Id:		0,
		VerifyKey:	vKey,
		Addr:		"",
		Remark:		"",
		Status:		true,
		IsConnect:	false,
		RateLimit:	0,
		Flow:		new(Flow),
		Rate:		nil,
		NoStore:	noStore,
		RWMutex:	sync.RWMutex{},
		NoDisplay:	noDisplay,
	}
}
